title: indulgent fluffy basque comte galette
description: A rich and creamy Basque-inspired dessert featuring Comté cheese, flaky low-carb bread, and a hint of nuttiness.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the almond flour, granulated sweetener, xanthan gum, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and melted butter.
Add the egg mixture to the dry ingredients and stir until a sticky dough forms.
Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead for 2-3 minutes, until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Form the dough into a round shape and place it on a parchment-lined baking sheet.
Bake the galette for 25-30 minutes, or until it is golden brown and set.
While the galette is baking, combine the Comté cheese and nutmeg in a small bowl.
Once the galette is done, remove it from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Transfer the galette to a wire rack to cool completely.
Just before serving, top the galette with the Comté cheese mixture and garnish with additional grated Comté cheese if desired.
